text: 1. SWIFT runs this giver of delight, even the stream of flowing juice: Swift runs this giver of delight. 2. The Morning knows all precious things, the Goddess knows her grace to man: Swift runs this giver of delight. 3. We have accepted thousands from Dhvasra's and Purusanti's hands: Swift runs this giver of delight. 4. From whom we have accepted thus thousands and three times ten beside: Swift runs this giver of delight.

metadata.title: Rig Veda - Mandala 9 Hymn 58
metadata.citation: Rig Veda, Mandala 9, Hymn 58; Ralph T. H. Griffith translation
